title: Cirrus: Fix not uploading logformatter html
body:
Previously we were generating the annotated results but never uploading
them.  Fix this so visiting the advertised URL actually works.

comments.body: LGTM, thank you for finding and fixing so quickly

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *cdoern*, *cevich*, *rhatdan* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [rhatdan] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

Was waiting to confirm before slash-lgtm'ing. Confirmed: [APIv2 test logs are uploaded](https://storage.googleapis.com/cirrus-ci-6707778565701632-fcae48/artifacts/containers/podman/6175186694176768/html/apiv2-podman-fedora-34-root-host.log.html).
